mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_meeting_tag (meeting_id, tag_id, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, is_deleted) VALUES
(#{item.meetingId}, #{item.tagId}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.isDeleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_meeting_tag SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE meeting_id = #{meetingId} AND is_deleted = 0
